description_long: This helmet features a menacing skull motif with exaggerated, deep-set eye sockets and a wide, open jaw displaying sharp teeth. The surface is a matte, bone-like gray with visible cracks and texture, giving it a weathered, sinister appearance. Prominently, there are several black, conical spikes protruding from the top and sides, adding to its intimidating look. On each side of the helmet, a red pentagram is embedded within a darkened circular patch, providing a striking contrast and a gothic, occult aesthetic. The interior appears hollow, designed to fit over a head, with the jaw and teeth forming a dramatic lower edge. The overall design suggests a decorative or costume use, rather than practical protection.
description: A skull-shaped helmet with black spikes, red pentagram emblems on the sides, and a weathered gray surface, exuding a gothic and intimidating style.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the open jaw, sharp teeth, three central black spikes, and the left-side red pentagram emblem.
description_view_1: Front-right view highlighting the right-side pentagram, the full set of spikes, and the pronounced eye sockets.
description_view_2: Rear-left view focusing on the back curvature, the distribution of spikes, and the left pentagram partially visible.
description_view_3: Rear-right view displaying the back and right side, with the right pentagram and spikes most prominent.
attribute_graphic_design: Gothic skull motif with black spikes and red pentagram emblems on each side; weathered, bone-like texture.
